'''Chituhr''' was a member of the [[Travelling Jindas]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. He served as the tribe's animal trainer. He was large, well-muscled, and frightening in appearance. He wore his fur in a pom-pom atop his head and sported a blue jumpsuit. Chituhr shared his name with [[Chituhr (spirit)|Chituhr]], an Ewok deity.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Kenner Products|Kenner]] planned to produce a Chituhr action figure as part of its [[Star Wars: Ewoks (toy line)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'' toy line]], but the figure never got beyond the prototype stage. The [[Disney+]] subtitles for "[[The Travelling Jindas]]" misspells his name as "Chitour."
